name: social-promoter-mcp
description: Draft tone-aware social posts in your own voice from a blog post or coding session, and publish to X behind an explicit cost and approval gate.
long_description: Social Promoter gives any agent the deterministic half of a social-promotion workflow. It finds your latest post and samples your real prose, returns a voice profile you maintain so drafts sound like you, lints drafts against your voice rules, estimates the paid X API cost, and publishes only behind an explicit confirmation gate. Drafting is free and local. Publishing is the only step that spends money and it never fires without your go-ahead on the exact text. Connect X once and your credentials travel across every workspace.

tools.name: find_latest_post
tools.description: Find the newest post and return full bodies as tone samples.

tools.name: get_voice_profile
tools.description: Return the author's maintained voice profile and corpus summary.

tools.name: lint_voice
tools.description: Check a draft against the voice rules and return structured violations.

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Estimate the paid X API cost of publishing a post.

tools.name: publish_post
tools.description: Publish an approved post to X behind an explicit confirmation gate.

posts_dir.title: Posts directory
posts_dir.description: Folder of your published markdown posts. Used to sample your writing voice and find the latest post. Optional; you can also pass it per request.

site_url.title: Public site URL
site_url.description: Base URL of your blog (e.g. https://you.github.io), used to build article links. Optional.

voice_file.title: Voice profile file
voice_file.description: Path to your maintained voice profile (voice.md). Optional; the server also looks in the workspace and in ~/.social-promoter/voice.md.

x_api_key.title: X API Key
x_api_key.description: Consumer key from your X developer app. Only needed to publish. Leave blank to draft only, or to connect later with the login command.

x_api_secret.title: X API Key Secret
x_api_secret.description: Consumer secret from your X developer app.

x_access_token.title: X Access Token
x_access_token.description: Access token from your X developer app (Read and Write).

x_access_secret.title: X Access Token Secret
x_access_secret.description: Access token secret from your X developer app.
